summary: Advocate Public Profile feature testing complete. All backend APIs and frontend forms working correctly. The feature allows advocates to showcase professional credentials (achievements, publications, memberships, bar_admissions) on their public profile page.

backend_api_tests: GET /api/advocates/public/{advocate_id} - Returns all professional fields (17/17 tests passed)
Data persistence verified - Updates persist and can be retrieved
frontend_public_profile_page: Notable Achievements section displays correctly with medal icons
Bar Admissions section displays in sidebar with shield icons
Professional Memberships section displays in sidebar
frontend_profile_edit_form: Notable Achievements form - add/remove entries works
Publications & Articles form - add/remove entries works
Bar Admissions form - add/remove entries works (emerald badges)
Professional Memberships form - add/remove entries works (purple badges)
Professional Experience form - add/remove entries works
Save Public Profile button saves data successfully

seed_data_creation: Test data was added and then restored to original state after testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Advocate Public Profile feature is fully functional. Backend endpoints PUT /api/user/public-profile and GET /api/advocates/public/{advocate_id} work correctly. Frontend ProfilePage.jsx has form sections for all professional fields (achievements, publications, memberships, bar_admissions, education, experience). AdvocateProfilePage.jsx displays all sections correctly. Test file created at /app/backend/tests/test_public_profile.py with 17 passing tests.
